DESCRIPTION: Verifies that --deep output renders the Findings section with large changes, config changes, missing tests warning, and all-changes summary.
NAME: Deep mode includes categorized findings

DESCRIPTION: When additions/deletions keys are absent from the API response, line counts are derived from the diff string.
NAME: Falls back to raw diff counting when API values missing

DESCRIPTION: Files with combined additions+deletions exceeding 200 lines are flagged as large changes.
NAME: Detects large changes (>200 lines total)

DESCRIPTION: Files containing 'test' or 'spec' in their path are classified as test changes.
NAME: Detects test files by naming convention

DESCRIPTION: Verifies that --caveman output excludes the commits section for a compact view.
NAME: Caveman mode omits commits and deep findings

DESCRIPTION: When the API provides additions and deletions values, those are used directly without falling back to diff parsing.
NAME: Prefers API additions/deletions over diff counting

DESCRIPTION: Dockerfiles, CI configs, and other infra files are classified as config changes.
NAME: Detects configuration and infra files

DESCRIPTION: Verifies that the JSON formatter produces valid output with all expected top-level keys and correct value types.
NAME: Basic JSON output includes MR metadata, commits, and file diffs

DESCRIPTION: Verifies that legitimate source files (.go, .py, .tsx, .yaml) pass through without exclusion.
NAME: Source code and config files are not excluded

DESCRIPTION: Verifies that the default markdown output includes the MR header, author, branch info, commits section, and changed files table with line counts.
NAME: Standard mode renders MR metadata, commits, and file table

DESCRIPTION: All commits from the MR are serialized in the commits array with SHA, title, and author.
NAME: JSON output includes multiple commits

DESCRIPTION: Verifies that image and checksum files (.png, .jpg, .ico, .sum) are flagged as excluded.
NAME: Binary and checksum extensions are excluded

DESCRIPTION: An empty diff list should return all empty categories and has_tests=False.
NAME: Empty diff produces empty results

DESCRIPTION: Lockfiles with large diffs should be entirely removed from analysis categories.
NAME: Excluded files are completely skipped

DESCRIPTION: When the API provides explicit additions/deletions values, those are used in the JSON output rather than diff string counting.
NAME: JSON output uses API additions/deletions when available

DESCRIPTION: Verifies that common lockfiles (npm, yarn, Go) are flagged as noise and excluded from diff analysis.
NAME: Lockfiles are excluded from analysis

DESCRIPTION: Leading and trailing blank lines and whitespace around the MR description should be cleaned up.
NAME: Description whitespace is stripped
